report_info.test_scenario: FAILING GATE EVIDENCE - Intentionally vulnerable dependency injected

vulnerabilities.title: Command Injection
vulnerabilities.description: Prototype Pollution in lodash before 4.17.21 allows attackers to manipulate JavaScript objects via the template function

vulnerabilities.title: Prototype Pollution
vulnerabilities.description: lodash versions prior to 4.17.21 are vulnerable to Prototype Pollution via the baseClone function

vulnerabilities.title: Prototype Pollution
vulnerabilities.description: lodash versions prior to 4.17.19 are vulnerable to Prototype Pollution

vulnerabilities.title: Prototype Pollution
vulnerabilities.description: lodash versions prior to 4.17.12 are vulnerable to Prototype Pollution

message: SECURITY GATE FAILED: Found 1 CRITICAL, 3 HIGH severity vulnerabilities. Pipeline execution halted.
pipeline_action: Build terminated at Security Scan stage due to critical vulnerabilities
evidence_note: This report demonstrates the security gate working correctly by blocking vulnerable dependencies. The vulnerable lodash@4.17.15 was intentionally injected using test-vulnerable-dependency.sh script to demonstrate failing gate evidence.
